this page is a list of digital gardens that i've found and love. there's no particular order, so click around at random and explore whichever ones interest you.

## gardens
- [jacky zhao's garden](https://jzhao.xyz) (psst also check out [quartz!](https://quartz.jzhao.xyz/))
- [avas's garden](https://blog.avas.space/garden/)
- [joel hooks' garden](https://joelhooks.com/)
- [maggie appleton's garden](https://maggieappleton.com/garden)

## more gardens (& resources)

maggie also has a [repo](https://github.com/MaggieAppleton/digital-gardeners) with links to various digital gardens and tools for creating your own. if either of those things interest you, check it out!

*see also:*
- [the beauty of digital gardens](/beauty-of-gardens/)
- [why i prefer digital gardens](/why-gardens/)

## other cool web sites

[from wikipedia](https://en.wikipedia.org/Website): *"a website (also written as a web site) is one or more web pages and related content that is identified by a common domain name and published on at least one web server."*

here are more n>=1 sets of web pages and related content identified by common domain names that i think are cool:

- [maia's website](https://maia.crimew.gay)
- [ben's website](https://benhayashi.com)
- [oat.zone](https://oat.zone)
